title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Paytm Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Paytm Ventures Solutions:
Paytm Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Ventures Solutions!
